name: claude-context-status
description: Shows the active Claude Code chat's context-window usage and your plan limits in the status bar.

claudeContext.refreshIntervalSeconds.description: How often (seconds) to re-read the active session's context.

claudeContext.usageRefreshIntervalSecond.description: How often (seconds) to poll the plan-usage endpoint.

claudeContext.showPlanUsage.description: Show plan usage (session/weekly limits) alongside context.

claudeContext.warnAtTokens.description: Tint the status bar yellow when context reaches this many tokens.

claudeContext.dangerAtTokens.description: Tint the status bar red when context reaches this many tokens.

enumDescriptions: Percent of the context limit, e.g. 'ctx 69%'.
claudeContext.contextDisplay.description: How to display the current context size in the status bar.

claudeContext.contextLimit.description: Denominator for percent display, in tokens. Set to 1000000 if you run a 1M-context model. Warn/danger thresholds remain in absolute tokens regardless.
